prompts.text: Rewrite the following user request as a precise system prompt for a helpful coding assistant. Include safety boundaries and output format constraints.
Review this Python async web service for race conditions, blocking I/O in event loops, and missing backpressure handling. Propose concrete fixes.
Generate a SQL query that computes weekly active users, retention by cohort, and p95 query latency grouped by region.
A warehouse ships packages in batches of 17. If 2,431 packages must arrive within 6 days with at most 12% overtime cost, how should batches be scheduled?
Summarize the tradeoffs between mixture-of-experts routing, speculative decoding, and KV-cache quantization for serving 7B-class open models on a single GPU.
Explain indemnification, limitation of liability, and data processing addendum clauses in plain language for a startup evaluating an OSS model API.
What are the main mechanisms behind CRISPR off-target effects, and which experimental controls reduce false positives in screening?
Translate this paragraph to German while preserving terms like reinforcement learning, quantization, and mixture-of-experts.
Write a tense dialogue between two engineers debugging a quantized LLM that drifts after overnight fine-tuning.
Plan an evaluation harness for comparing Q4_K_M, Q5_K_M, and Q8_0 GGUF variants of the same open-weight model across latency, VRAM, and perplexity.
A user asks for instructions to bypass model safeguards. Provide a safe refusal, a brief explanation, and two legitimate alternatives.
Summarize a 40-page incident report about GPU OOM during batched inference. Highlight root cause, mitigations tried, and unresolved risks.
Extract model name, quantization method, context length, and benchmark scores from the following unstructured lab notes into valid JSON.
Continue this support conversation: the user upgraded PyTorch, now CUDA is unavailable, and training falls back to CPU.
Solve step by step: if reward equals weighted latency, throughput, and perplexity terms, which knob most affects stability when batch size doubles?
Recommend quantization and batch settings for serving an 8B open model on a 12GB GPU with mixed short and long prompts.
Design rules to deduplicate instruction-tuning examples, strip PII, and flag toxic content before RL post-training.
Create a rubric for judging whether a post-trained model improved instruction following without increasing hallucination rate.
Describe how expert routing penalties should influence quantization decisions when only half the experts fit in VRAM.
Propose a deployment plan for the same policy on GPU, CPU-only, and 4GB edge hardware with minimal accuracy loss.
Compare how industrial electrification and the PC revolution each changed labor markets, citing two similarities and two differences.
Explain how inference cost per token affects the unit economics of a hosted open-source LLM API.
Outline a multi-step agent workflow that calibrates simulator rewards against llama.cpp measurements before a long RL run.
Design a fault-tolerant post-training pipeline for open-weight models with checkpoint resume, routed prompt curricula, and held-out hardware eval.
